title: Mini RPC
description: A lightweight RPC framework written in modern C++23. Register a function on the server, call it from the client — that's it.

title: CHIP-8 Emulator
description: A CHIP-8 emulator capable of running most original CHIP-8 games. Implements the full instruction set with accurate timing and display output via Raylib.

title: AGV Simulator
description: An Automated Guided Vehicle simulator with a neural network for movement prediction. Communicates via OPC UA protocol, simulating industrial automation scenarios.
